= Journal 2026-04-05 =

== PyScaffold ==
:python:pyscaffold:

{{{cfg
# PyScaffold's configuration file, see:
# https://pyscaffold.org/en/latest/configuration.html
#
# Accepted in `metadata`: author, author_email and license.
# Accepted in `pyscaffold`: extensions (and associated opts).
[metadata]
license = MIT
[pyscaffold]
version = 4.6
extensions =
    dsproject
    github_actions
    markdown
    no_skeleton
    pre_commit
    pre_commit_ruff
dsproject_version = 0.7.2
}}}

{{{bash
putup -v --description 'Add a short description here!' \
  --save-config './project_dir/.pyscaffold.cfg' \
  project_dir
}}}
